message:
fix(e2e): Clean up test code and improve assertions

- Fix assertion logic in keyboard toggle test (use .not.toEqual)
- Remove redundant browser skip calls (beforeEach already handles)
- Add actual clipboard content verification in copy test
- Remove unused browserName parameters from test functions

All 147 tests passing, 18 skipped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
